chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4217 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.17400/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 8 3. For order on Misc. No.17401/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.17402/2025 (Stay) 5. For order on Misc. No.17403/2025 (Insp. App.) 6. For hearing of main case 29.8.2025 Mr. Farooq Hashim advocate for the petitioners -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-6. According to learned counsel for the petitioners this Court had ordered the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) to pass a speaking order in respect of the petitioners’ complaint. We have heard the petitioners’ counsel. At page 47 of the file, a decision made by the SBCA has been filed, which is a speaking order, as such no further action is required by this Court. This petition is accordingly dismissed alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
